extract: Pay Day (Japanese: ネコにこばん Coin for a Cat) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced in Generation I. In Generations II and III, it was the signature move of Meowth and Persian, and from Generations IV to VI, it was the signature move of Meowth. It is: TM16 in Generation I. TM57 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TM02 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM116 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
